entries.text:
Verse 1

Herod

See margin ref., (See Scofield "Matthew 14:1").

Verse 6

sorcerer

(Greek - μάγος)." See Matthew 2:1, "wise men." The same word was used for a vulgar magician, and for a true wise man of the East.

Verse 7

deputy

proconsul (Roman).

Verse 22

said See, 1 Samuel 13:14; Psalms 89:20.

See Kingdom note, Zechariah 12:8; 1 Corinthians 15:28; 2 Samuel 7:8-17.

(See Scofield "2 Samuel 7:16").

Verse 23

Saviour

(See Scofield "Romans 1:16").

Verse 26

salvation

(See Scofield "Romans 1:16").

Verse 38

sins

Sin. (See Scofield "Romans 3:23").

Verse 39

all things

(See Scofield "Romans 1:16").

Verse 41

work

See, Habakkuk 1:5.
